labels.ja: エージェントシステム本体

short_definitions.zh: 为 Agent 构建、运行与治理提供闭环逻辑的一张统一概念图。
short_definitions.en: One unified concept graph providing closed-loop logic for building, running, and governing agents.
short_definitions.ja: エージェントの構築、実行、統治に閉ループ論理を提供する一つの統一概念グラフ。

definitions.en: Canonical domain for the agent-system ontology family.
definitions.zh: 智能体系统本体是面向智能体运行、信息、记忆、编排、工具、安全、反馈和适配器语义的规范领域本体，用于把概念、关系、字段、公理与证据源组织为可验证的体系。
definitions.ja: エージェントシステム本体は、実行、情報、記憶、オーケストレーション、ツール、安全、フィードバック、アダプタ意味を扱う標準領域本体で、概念、関係、フィールド、公理、出典を検証可能な体系として組織します。

why_needed.zh: 统一标识、专业化层级和关系合同使实现、验证、案例和外部映射共享同一语义依据。
why_needed.en: Shared identifiers, specialization hierarchy, and relation contracts give implementation, validation, cases, and external mappings one semantic basis.
why_needed.ja: 共通識別子、特殊化階層、関係契約により、実装、検証、事例、外部写像が同じ意味基盤を共有します。

source_claims.supports: FIBO demonstrates modular, stable-identifier ontology publication and hierarchical browsing.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > FIBO Viewer heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Entity types, properties, constraints, and typed directional relationships form a unified semantic graph.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Ontology items, entity types, properties, and relationships

labels.ja: コンテキスト取り込みとステージングドメイン

definitions.en: Context Ingress & Staging Domain is the operational concern domain for observable content becoming available to an agent step or model call. It models message and instruction envelopes, source references, content blocks, context windows, lightweight discovery pointers, disclosed output segments, and execution observations as they are selected, transformed, cited, suppressed, or staged into context.
definitions.zh: 上下文摄入与暂存域是描述可观察内容如何进入某次 agent 步骤或模型调用可见上下文的运行关注域。它建模消息与指令包络、来源引用、内容块、上下文窗口、轻量发现指针、已披露输出片段，以及执行观测在被选择、转换、引用、抑制或暂存进上下文时的语义。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト取り込みとステージングドメインは、観測可能な内容がエージェントのステップまたはモデル呼び出しで利用可能なコンテキストになる過程を扱う運用関心ドメインです。メッセージと指示の包絡、出典参照、内容ブロック、コンテキストウィンドウ、軽量発見ポインタ、開示済み出力セグメント、実行観測が、選択、変換、引用、抑制、またはコンテキストへステージングされるときの意味をモデル化します。

It models message and instruction envelopes, source references, content blocks, context windows, lightweight discovery pointers, disclosed output segments, and execution observations as they are selected, transformed, cited, suppressed, or staged into context. The ontology-specific boundary for info-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.ja: 制御とオーケストレーションドメイン

definitions.en: Control & Orchestration Domain is the operational concern domain for transforming goals into executable, delegated, routed, reviewed, and synthesized workflows. It models objectives, task plans, delegation ownership, handoffs, agents-as-tools, context isolation, worker selection, routing targets, gates, topology, prompt chains, parallel composition, synthesis provenance, and bounded feedback or retry loops.
definitions.zh: 控制与编排域是把目标转化为可执行、可委派、可路由、可审查和可综合工作流的运行关注域。它描述可操作目标、任务计划、委派归属、交接、智能体作为工具调用、上下文隔离、工作者选择、路由目标、闸门、拓扑、提示链、并行组合、综合来源，以及有边界的反馈或重试循环。
definitions.ja: 制御とオーケストレーションドメインは、目標を実行、委任、経路づけ、レビュー、統合が可能なワークフローへ変換する運用関心ドメインです。操作可能な目的、タスク計画、委任帰属、引き継ぎ、エージェント道具呼び出し、文脈隔離、作業者選択、経路目標、ゲート、構造、プロンプト連鎖、並列構成、統合来歴、境界付きフィードバックまたは再試行ループを記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of orchestration-plane: Control & Orchestration Domain is the operational concern domain for transforming goals into executable, delegated, routed, reviewed, and synthesized workflows. It models objectives, task plans, delegation ownership, handoffs, agents-as-tools, context isolation, worker selection, routing targets, gates, topology, prompt chains, parallel composition, synthesis provenance, and bounded feedback or retry loops. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.ja: 実行状態とトレースドメイン

definitions.en: Runtime State & Trace Domain is the operational concern domain for bounded execution episodes and raw runtime evidence. It models sessions, attempts, outcomes, actors, environments, budgets, trace records, spans, events, checkpoints, snapshots, state diffs, replay evidence, transcripts, retention policy, and artifact provenance so agent activity can be audited, recovered, replayed, and exported without storing hidden reasoning text.
definitions.zh: 运行状态与轨迹域是面向有边界执行片段与原始运行证据的运行关注域。它刻画运行会话、执行尝试、执行结果、参与者、环境、预算、可观测追踪记录、跨度、事件、检查点、快照、状态差异、回放证据、转录、保留策略与产物溯源，使智能体活动能够被审计、恢复、回放和导出，同时不要求保存隐藏推理文本。
definitions.ja: 実行状態とトレースドメインは、境界付けられた実行エピソードと生の実行証拠を扱う運用関心ドメインです。実行セッション、試行、結果、アクター、環境、予算、観測可能なトレース記録、スパン、イベント、チェックポイント、スナップショット、状態差分、再生証拠、転写、保持ポリシー、成果物来歴を表し、隠れた推論テキストを保存せずに監査、復元、再生、エクスポートできるようにします。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of runtime-plane: Runtime State & Trace Domain is the operational concern domain for bounded execution episodes and raw runtime evidence. It models sessions, attempts, outcomes, actors, environments, budgets, trace records, spans, events, checkpoints, snapshots, state diffs, replay evidence, transcripts, retention policy, and artifact provenance so agent activity can be audited, recovered, replayed, and exported without storing hidden reasoning text. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 相互運用とアダプタドメイン

definitions.en: Interoperability & Adapter Domain is an operational concern domain that acts as the adapter membrane for external protocols, frameworks, benchmarks, statecharts, schema profiles, semantic exports, language profiles, Graph IR, and frontend views. It records directional mappings between external constructs and canonical ontology terms, preserves source and version provenance, surfaces conversion loss or unsupported semantics, and prevents adapter-specific fields from redefining ontology core.
definitions.zh: 互操作适配域是八个运行关注域之一，承担外部协议、框架、基准、状态图、模式剖面、语义导出、语言剖面、图谱中间表示和前端视图进入规范本体前的适配膜职责。它记录外部构造与规范术语之间的映射方向，保留来源和版本溯源，暴露转换损失或不支持语义，并防止适配器专属字段重定义核心本体。
definitions.ja: 相互運用とアダプタドメインは八つの運用関心領域の一つであり、外部プロトコル、フレームワーク、ベンチマーク、状態図、スキーマプロファイル、意味論的エクスポート、言語プロファイル、グラフ中間表現、フロントエンドビューを標準オントロジーへ入れる前のアダプタ膜として働きます。外部構成と標準用語の写像方向、出典と版の来歴、変換損失や未対応意味を記録し、アダプタ固有フィールドがコア本体を再定義しないようにします。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of adapter-plane: Interoperability & Adapter Domain is an operational concern domain that acts as the adapter membrane for external protocols, frameworks, benchmarks, statecharts, schema profiles, semantic exports, language profiles, Graph IR, and frontend views. It records directional mappings between external constructs and canonical ontology terms, preserves source and version provenance, surfaces conversion loss or unsupported semantics, and prevents adapter-specific fields from redefining ontology core. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > A2A docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 能力とリソース呼び出しドメイン

definitions.en: Operational concern domain for tool and capability registries, discovery, matching, invocation, execution, MCP transport, resources, prompts, results, and observable side effects.
definitions.zh: 能力与资源调用域是运行关注域，描述工具与能力注册、发现、匹配、调用、执行、MCP 传输、资源、提示、结果和可观测副作用。
definitions.ja: 能力とリソース呼び出しドメインは運用関心ドメインで、ツールと能力の登録、発見、照合、呼び出し、実行、MCP転送、リソース、プロンプト、結果、観測可能な副作用を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of tool-plane: Operational concern domain for tool and capability registries, discovery, matching, invocation, execution, MCP transport, resources, prompts, results, and observable side effects. labels.ja: 信頼、ポリシー、安全ドメイン

definitions.en: Operational concern domain for trust boundaries, authority scopes, permission prompts, policy decisions, sandboxing, network controls, injection defense, commit gates, redaction, and audit disclosure.
definitions.zh: 信任、策略与安全域是运行关注域，描述信任边界、权限范围、权限提示、策略决策、沙箱、网络控制、注入防御、提交闸门、脱敏和审计披露。
definitions.ja: 信頼、ポリシー、安全ドメインは運用関心ドメインで、信頼境界、権限範囲、権限プロンプト、ポリシー判断、サンドボックス、ネットワーク制御、注入防御、コミットゲート、秘匿化、監査開示を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of safety-plane: Operational concern domain for trust boundaries, authority scopes, permission prompts, policy decisions, sandboxing, network controls, injection defense, commit gates, redaction, and audit disclosure. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of safety-plane: Operational concern domain for trust boundaries, authority scopes, permission prompts, policy decisions, sandboxing, network controls, injection defense, commit gates, redaction, and audit disclosure. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 観測可能性とフィードバックドメイン

definitions.en: Observability & Feedback Domain is the operational concern domain for deriving diagnostic, review, metric, telemetry, audit, recovery, and learning signals from observable runtime evidence. It separates raw trace evidence from interpreted feedback, keeps benchmark-specific semantics in adapters, and records how feedback returns to orchestration, memory, tool selection, policy, and optimization loops.
definitions.zh: 可观测性与反馈域是从可观察运行证据中派生诊断、审查、指标、遥测、审计、恢复和学习信号的运行关注域。它区分原始轨迹证据与解释性反馈，将基准专属语义保留在适配器层，并记录反馈如何回流到编排、记忆、工具选择、策略和优化循环。
definitions.ja: 観測可能性とフィードバックドメインは、観測可能な実行証拠から診断、レビュー、指標、テレメトリ、監査、復旧、学習信号を導く運用関心ドメインです。生のトレース証拠と解釈済みフィードバックを分け、ベンチマーク固有の意味はアダプターに残し、フィードバックがオーケストレーション、記憶、ツール選択、ポリシー、最適化ループへ戻る経路を記録します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of feedback-plane: Observability & Feedback Domain is the operational concern domain for deriving diagnostic, review, metric, telemetry, audit, recovery, and learning signals from observable runtime evidence. It separates raw trace evidence from interpreted feedback, keeps benchmark-specific semantics in adapters, and records how feedback returns to orchestration, memory, tool selection, policy, and optimization loops. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

source_claims.locator: Method and experiments > Conductor orchestration model

labels.zh: 记忆与上下文持久化域
labels.ja: 記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン

definitions.en: Memory & Context Persistence Domain is the operational concern domain for agentic memory stores, scoped memory records, context assembly, retrieval pipelines, and memory lifecycle operations. It covers ingestion, memory typology, chunking, embedding, indexing, retrieval, ranking, context inclusion, summarization, preference memory, and the write-update-delete-merge-consolidate-expire-validate loop that lets persistent memory influence future behavior under provenance and safety controls.
definitions.zh: 记忆与上下文持久化域是面向智能体记忆库、作用域化记忆记录、上下文组装、检索管线和记忆生命周期操作的运行关注域。它覆盖摄入、记忆类型、分块、嵌入、索引、检索、排序、上下文纳入、摘要、偏好记忆，以及在来源与安全控制下让持久记忆影响未来行为的写入、更新、删除、合并、巩固、过期和验证循环。
definitions.ja: 記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメインは、エージェント的な記憶ストア、スコープ付き記憶レコード、コンテキスト組み立て、検索パイプライン、記憶ライフサイクル操作を扱う運用関心ドメインです。取り込み、記憶類型、チャンク化、埋め込み、索引、検索、順位付け、文脈への組み込み、要約、選好記憶、そして来歴と安全制御の下で永続記憶が将来の振る舞いへ影響する書き込み、更新、削除、統合、集約、期限切れ、検証の循環を扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Domain boundary of memory-plane: Memory & Context Persistence Domain is the operational concern domain for agentic memory stores, scoped memory records, context assembly, retrieval pipelines, and memory lifecycle operations. It covers ingestion, memory typology, chunking, embedding, indexing, retrieval, ranking, context inclusion, summarization, preference memory, and the write-update-delete-merge-consolidate-expire-validate loop that lets persistent memory influence future behavior under provenance and safety controls. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-plane is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.ja: 実行観測取り込みモジュール

definitions.en: models stdout, stderr, exit status, tool results, and other observable execution outputs only as they become context inputs
definitions.zh: 执行观测摄入模块只描述标准输出、标准错误、退出状态、工具结果和其他可观察执行输出如何成为上下文输入，不拥有命令执行或容器本身。
definitions.ja: 実行観測取り込みモジュールは、標準出力、標準エラー、終了状態、ツール結果、その他の観測可能な実行出力がコンテキスト入力になる過程だけを扱い、コマンド実行やコンテナ自体は所有しません。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-container-command: The module separates observation records from reference information through ExecutionObservation and ExecutionReference, while stdout/stderr streams and chunks specialize the existing OutputStream and OutputChunk concepts. Command behavior remains owned by the Tool domain, and CommandExitStatus becomes a scalar field on ExitStatusObservation rather than a false concept. The ontology-specific boundary for info-container-command is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-container-command: The module separates observation records from reference information through ExecutionObservation and ExecutionReference, while stdout/stderr streams and chunks specialize the existing OutputStream and OutputChunk concepts. Command behavior remains owned by the Tool domain, and CommandExitStatus becomes a scalar field on ExitStatusObservation rather than a false concept. The ontology-specific boundary for info-container-command is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 内容ブロックとモダリティモジュール

definitions.en: models bounded content blocks, modalities, encodings, mime types, token counts, and attachment blocks staged into context
definitions.zh: 内容块与模态模块描述被暂存进上下文的有边界内容块、模态、编码、媒体类型、令牌计数和附件块。
definitions.ja: 内容ブロックとモダリティモジュールは、コンテキストへステージングされる境界付き内容ブロック、モダリティ、符号化、メディア型、トークン数、添付ブロックを記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-content-block-modality: ContentBlock is the common genus for seven payload modalities, each distinguished by payload form. Encoding, MimeType, TokenCount, and MessageModality lack independent business identity and move into ContentBlock fields. MessageContentBlock remains a traceable association between a message and blocks rather than pretending to be another modality. The ontology-specific boundary for info-content-block-modality is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-content-block-modality: ContentBlock is the common genus for seven payload modalities, each distinguished by payload form. MessageContentBlock remains a traceable association between a message and blocks rather than pretending to be another modality. The ontology-specific boundary for info-content-block-modality is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 軽量コンテキスト発見モジュール

definitions.en: models lightweight discovery pointers, retrieval queries, retrieved candidates, candidate ranks, scores, and index-version references used to select context
definitions.zh: 轻量上下文发现模块描述轻量发现指针、检索查询、检索候选、候选排序、评分和索引版本引用如何用于选择上下文。
definitions.ja: 軽量コンテキスト発見モジュールは、軽量発見ポインタ、検索問い合わせ、検索候補、候補順位、スコア、索引バージョン参照がコンテキスト選択に使われる過程を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-indexing: The module separates lightweight discovery indexes, discovery results, and discovery scores into three non-conflated genera. RetrievedContextCandidate further specializes RetrievedCandidate, while CandidateRank is an observed quality rather than a candidate subtype. Persistent index versions remain owned by Memory and are linked through references. The ontology-specific boundary for info-indexing is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-indexing: The module separates lightweight discovery indexes, discovery results, and discovery scores into three non-conflated genera. Persistent index versions remain owned by Memory and are linked through references. The ontology-specific boundary for info-indexing is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 消息、指令与提示包络模块
labels.ja: メッセージ、指示、プロンプト包絡モジュール

definitions.en: models message envelopes, instruction artifacts, prompt templates, role metadata, senders, receivers, conversation identity, and instruction conflict resolution
definitions.zh: 消息、指令与提示包络模块描述消息包络、指令产物、提示模板、角色元数据、发送方、接收方、会话身份和指令冲突解决。
definitions.ja: メッセージ、指示、プロンプト包絡モジュールは、メッセージ包絡、指示成果物、プロンプトテンプレート、役割メタデータ、送信者、受信者、会話識別、指示衝突解決を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-messages-instructions: Seven sending contexts form strict Message subtypes. ConversationElement groups conversations, turns, and observable history, while Instruction covers only normatively effective directives and InstructionMetadata groups authority, priority, scope, applicability, and provenance. IDs, indexes, sender/receiver roles, and template variables become fields; ReplyTo becomes a Message self-relation; InstructionConflict remains uniquely owned by Safety. The ontology-specific boundary for info-messages-instructions is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-messages-instructions: Seven sending contexts form strict Message subtypes. ConversationElement groups conversations, turns, and observable history, while Instruction covers only normatively effective directives and InstructionMetadata groups authority, priority, scope, applicability, and provenance. IDs, indexes, sender/receiver roles, and template variables become fields; ReplyTo becomes a Message self-relation; InstructionConflict remains uniquely owned by Safety. The ontology-specific boundary for info-messages-instructions is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 上下文窗口与披露模块
labels.ja: コンテキストウィンドウと開示モジュール

definitions.en: models visible context windows, disclosed output segments, selection decisions, citations, truncation, compression, and suppressed context spans
definitions.zh: 上下文窗口与披露模块描述可见上下文窗口、已披露输出片段、选择决策、引用、截断、压缩和被抑制上下文片段。
definitions.ja: コンテキストウィンドウと開示モジュールは、可視コンテキストウィンドウ、開示済み出力セグメント、選択判断、引用、切り詰め、圧縮、抑制済みコンテキスト範囲を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-output-disclosure: OutputInformation groups explainable streams, segments, windows, and citations. OutputChunk strictly specializes OutputSegment, and OutputWindow specializes into head-tail and visible-context windows. DisclosureArtifact groups disclosed, suppressed, and truncated audit artifacts. LengthLimit becomes a field, and ProgressiveDisclosure is only referenced from Safety. The ontology-specific boundary for info-output-disclosure is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-output-disclosure: OutputInformation groups explainable streams, segments, windows, and citations. OutputChunk strictly specializes OutputSegment, and OutputWindow specializes into head-tail and visible-context windows. DisclosureArtifact groups disclosed, suppressed, and truncated audit artifacts. LengthLimit becomes a field, and ProgressiveDisclosure is only referenced from Safety. The ontology-specific boundary for info-output-disclosure is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 出典と資源参照モジュール

definitions.en: models references, spans, locations, anchors, digests, versions, access paths, and trust annotations for source material entering context
definitions.zh: 来源与资源引用模块描述进入上下文的来源引用、片段、位置、锚点、摘要指纹、版本、访问路径与信任标注，而不拥有完整存储系统。
definitions.ja: 出典と資源参照モジュールは、コンテキストに入る出典参照、範囲、位置、アンカー、ダイジェスト、バージョン、アクセス経路、信頼注記を扱い、完全な保存システムは所有しません。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-storage-sources: SourceReference covers stable references to retrievable or citable source objects and specializes by file, database row, graph node, network, and text document. SourceLocation specializes by line, page, cell, offset, and span; SourceIdentity groups versions and content fingerprints. DataZoneReference and TrustBoundaryReference remain governance references that point to Safety canonical nodes rather than pretending to be source kinds. The ontology-specific boundary for info-storage-sources is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of info-storage-sources: SourceReference covers stable references to retrievable or citable source objects and specializes by file, database row, graph node, network, and text document. SourceLocation specializes by line, page, cell, offset, and span; SourceIdentity groups versions and content fingerprints. DataZoneReference and TrustBoundaryReference remain governance references that point to Safety canonical nodes rather than pretending to be source kinds. The ontology-specific boundary for info-storage-sources is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュール

definitions.en: models coordination roles, delegation contracts, handoffs, agents-as-tools, authority scope, context isolation, ownership, worker selection, and delegation budgets
definitions.zh: 协同角色与委派模块属于控制与编排域，用于描述编排者、工作者、子智能体、交接、把智能体作为工具调用、上下文隔离、授权范围、责任归属、工作者选择和委派预算。
definitions.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、調整役、作業者、サブエージェント、引き継ぎ、エージェントを道具として呼び出す形、文脈隔離、権限範囲、責任帰属、作業者選択、委任予算を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-actors-delegation: Orchestrator, subagent role, and worker are modeled as coordination roles; tool-like delegation and task distribution specialize delegation process, while answer, control, and delegation ownership specialize coordination ownership records. Contracts, events, results, budgets, and context close the loop through relations rather than false process subtyping. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-actors-delegation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-actors-delegation: Orchestrator, subagent role, and worker are modeled as coordination roles; tool-like delegation and task distribution specialize delegation process, while answer, control, and delegation ownership specialize coordination ownership records. Contracts, events, results, budgets, and context close the loop through relations rather than false process subtyping. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-actors-delegation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

labels.ja: 構成パターンモジュール

definitions.en: models prompt chains, parallelization, sectioning, voting, and synthesis patterns
definitions.zh: 组合模式模块属于控制与编排域，描述提示链、并行、分段、投票、聚合或综合等任务分解与结果合成机制。
definitions.ja: 構成パターンモジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、プロンプトチェーン、並列化、分割、投票、集約、統合などのタスク分解と結果合成機構を記述する。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-composition: PromptChain, Parallelization, Sectioning, and Voting are static composition patterns; ChainStage, ParallelBranch, and SectionAssignment are composition parts. Synthesis is a runtime activity, while inputs, outputs, ballots, and plans are information or specifications connected by explicit relations. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-composition is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-composition: PromptChain, Parallelization, Sectioning, and Voting are static composition patterns; ChainStage, ParallelBranch, and SectionAssignment are composition parts. Synthesis is a runtime activity, while inputs, outputs, ballots, and plans are information or specifications connected by explicit relations. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-composition is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

labels.ja: 制御フィードバックループモジュール

definitions.en: models evaluator-optimizer control loops, review triggers, feedback routing, visible deliberation operations, revisions, and bounded stop or retry lineage
definitions.zh: 控制反馈循环模块属于控制与编排域，用于描述审查触发、反馈路由、可见审议步骤、修订计划、改进尝试以及停止或重试的控制脉络，而不拥有基准评分本身。
definitions.ja: 制御フィードバックループモジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、レビューの発火、フィードバック経路、可視の検討手順、修正計画、改善試行、停止または再試行の制御上の系譜を記述し、ベンチマーク採点そのものは所有しません。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-evaluation: Critique, reflection, revision plan, and stop/retry lineage specialize RevisionArtifact, while feedback routing is a ReviewCoordination activity. An improvement attempt is part of an improvement loop rather than its subtype, and generic FeedbackEvent ownership moves to the Feedback domain. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-evaluation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-evaluation: Critique, reflection, revision plan, and stop/retry lineage specialize RevisionArtifact, while feedback routing is a ReviewCoordination activity. An improvement attempt is part of an improvement loop rather than its subtype, and generic FeedbackEvent ownership moves to the Feedback domain. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-evaluation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

labels.ja: ルーティングと制御モジュール

definitions.en: models gates, routes, control policies, branching, and downstream operation selection
definitions.zh: 路由与控制模块属于控制与编排域，根据状态、策略、条件或观察结果选择下一步操作、分支、参与者、工具或停止路径。
definitions.ja: 経路と制御モジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、状態、ポリシー、条件、観測結果に基づき、次の操作、分岐、参加者、ツール、停止経路を選択する。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-routing-control: Policies, routes, retry policies, and conditions are routing specifications; branch, gate, and stop conditions strictly specialize RoutingCondition, while Gate specializes ControlGate. Decisions, targets, outcomes, and downstream operations are connected through evaluation, selection, and triggering. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-routing-control is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-routing-control: Policies, routes, retry policies, and conditions are routing specifications; branch, gate, and stop conditions strictly specialize RoutingCondition, while Gate specializes ControlGate. Decisions, targets, outcomes, and downstream operations are connected through evaluation, selection, and triggering. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-routing-control is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

labels.ja: タスク計画モジュール

definitions.en: models tasks, decomposition, work items, plans, and task dependencies
definitions.zh: 任务规划模块属于控制与编排域，表达目标、任务、计划、工作项、步骤、依赖、约束和完成准则，并支持可观测进度追踪。
definitions.ja: タスク計画モジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、目標、タスク、計画、作業項目、手順、依存、制約、完了基準を表し、観測可能な進捗追跡を支える。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-task-planning: Intentional entities, work specifications, and task conditions form strict taxonomies; goal, intent, and objective are linked by commitment and refinement, while plans, tasks, and steps use specification and composition rather than a fabricated inheritance chain. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-task-planning is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of orchestration-task-planning: Intentional entities, work specifications, and task conditions form strict taxonomies; goal, intent, and objective are linked by commitment and refinement, while plans, tasks, and steps use specification and composition rather than a fabricated inheritance chain. The ontology-specific boundary for orchestration-task-planning is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

labels.zh: 运行参与者与权限模块
labels.ja: 実行アクターと権限モジュール

definitions.en: models runtime actor identities, role bindings, capability bindings, authority scopes, local services, model-backed participants, human operators, and remote agent references
definitions.zh: 运行参与者与权限模块刻画运行中的参与者身份、角色绑定、能力绑定、权限范围、本地服务、模型参与者、人工操作者和远程智能体引用，用来追踪谁实际参与了某次运行以及具有什么责任边界。
definitions.ja: 実行アクターと権限モジュールは、実行中のアクター識別、役割バインディング、能力バインディング、権限範囲、ローカルサービス、モデル由来の参加者、人間オペレーター、遠隔エージェント参照を表し、誰がどの責任境界で実行に参加したかを追跡します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-actors: Actors specialize into human and software actors, models into generative, embedding, and reranking models, and the three binding records share ActorBinding; model entities are linked to model-using actors with uses rather than conflated with them. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-actors is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-actors: Actors specialize into human and software actors, models into generative, embedding, and reranking models, and the three binding records share ActorBinding; model entities are linked to model-using actors with uses rather than conflated with them. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-actors is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 実行成果物来歴モジュール

definitions.en: models runtime artifacts as produced, consumed, derived, attributed, reviewed, exported, drafted, or finalized work products with execution provenance
definitions.zh: 运行产物溯源模块刻画运行中被产生、消费、派生、归因、审查、导出、起草或最终化的工作产物，并保留它们与执行尝试、事件、参与者和会话之间的溯源关系。
definitions.ja: 実行成果物来歴モジュールは、実行中に生成、消費、派生、帰属、レビュー、エクスポート、下書き化、最終化された作業成果物を表し、それらと実行試行、イベント、アクター、セッションとの来歴関係を保持します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-artifacts: Export, patch, report, graph, and schema artifacts are genuine Artifact specializations; draft and final denote values of the same artifact status and must not remain pseudo-subclasses. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-artifacts is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-artifacts: Export, patch, report, graph, and schema artifacts are genuine Artifact specializations; draft and final denote values of the same artifact status and must not remain pseudo-subclasses. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-artifacts is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 运行追踪与检查点模块
labels.ja: 実行トレースとチェックポイントモジュール

definitions.en: models raw ordered execution evidence: transcripts, trace records, spans, span events, trace links, checkpoint restore events, snapshots, state diffs, replay events, audit records, and retention policy
definitions.zh: 运行追踪与检查点模块刻画原始且有序的运行证据，包括转录、追踪记录、跨度、跨度内事件、追踪链接、检查点恢复事件、状态快照、状态差异、回放事件、审计记录与追踪保留策略。
definitions.ja: 実行トレースとチェックポイントモジュールは、転写、トレース記録、スパン、スパン内イベント、トレースリンク、チェックポイント復元イベント、状態スナップショット、状態差分、再生イベント、監査記録、トレース保持ポリシーなど、生の順序付き実行証拠を表します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-observability: Records, state records, trace metadata, and observability events form strict categories; TraceRecord, TraceSpan, and TraceEvent are connected by containment and recording, never by a false record-to-span-to-event inheritance chain. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-observability is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-observability: Records, state records, trace metadata, and observability events form strict categories; TraceRecord, TraceSpan, and TraceEvent are connected by containment and recording, never by a false record-to-span-to-event inheritance chain. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-observability is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.en: Runtime Session And Execution Envelope Module
labels.zh: 运行会话与执行包络模块
labels.ja: 実行セッションと実行包絡モジュール

definitions.en: models bounded runtime sessions, execution attempts, outcomes, environments, budgets, and lifecycle transitions as the envelope in which agent activity actually occurs
definitions.zh: 运行会话与执行包络模块刻画有边界的运行会话、执行尝试、执行结果、运行环境、运行预算和生命周期转移，用来说明智能体活动实际发生在哪个执行片段内。
definitions.ja: 実行セッションと実行包絡モジュールは、境界付けられた実行セッション、実行試行、結果、環境、予算、ライフサイクル遷移を表し、エージェント活動が実際に発生した実行エピソードを示します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-system: The module has genuine specializations from Container to RuntimeEnvironment and from four lifecycle events to a shared event anchor; session, attempt, outcome, budget, and environment are instead connected by composition, occurrence, governance, and production. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-system is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of runtime-system: The module has genuine specializations from Container to RuntimeEnvironment and from four lifecycle events to a shared event anchor; session, attempt, outcome, budget, and environment are instead connected by composition, occurrence, governance, and production. The ontology-specific boundary for runtime-system is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: ベンチマークアダプタモジュール

definitions.en: models evaluation benchmark mappings for tasks, environments, scoring rubrics, metrics, observations, user simulations, artifacts, and pressure axes without turning benchmark-specific fields into ontology core
definitions.zh: 基准适配模块刻画评测基准中的任务、环境、评分规则、指标、观察、用户模拟、产物和压力轴如何映射到评估剖面，并防止基准专属字段进入核心本体。
definitions.ja: ベンチマークアダプタモジュールは、評価ベンチマークのタスク、環境、採点規則、指標、観測、ユーザーシミュレーション、成果物、負荷軸を評価プロファイルへ写像し、ベンチマーク固有フィールドがコアへ入らないようにします。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-benchmarks: BenchmarkAdapter is a genuine specialization of the cross-module Adapter, and each benchmark-specific adapter specializes it by the external benchmark it mediates. Tasks, environments, trajectories, observations, artifacts, scores, and outcomes align through mapping relations without copying benchmark class trees. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-benchmarks is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: README > AppWorld overview, architecture, and documented interfaces

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-benchmarks: BenchmarkAdapter is a genuine specialization of the cross-module Adapter, and each benchmark-specific adapter specializes it by the external benchmark it mediates. Tasks, environments, trajectories, observations, artifacts, scores, and outcomes align through mapping relations without copying benchmark class trees. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-benchmarks is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OSWorld site heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: フレームワークアダプタモジュール

definitions.en: models Phase-1 seed framework mappings for graph runtimes, agent SDKs, crews, workflows, handoffs, traces, and subagent systems
definitions.zh: 框架适配模块刻画第一阶段候选框架中的图运行时、智能体开发包、多智能体协作、工作流、交接、追踪和子智能体系统如何映射到规范术语。
definitions.ja: フレームワークアダプタモジュールは、第一段階の候補フレームワークに含まれるグラフ実行基盤、エージェント開発キット、複数エージェント協調、ワークフロー、引き継ぎ、トレース、サブエージェントシステムを標準用語へ写像します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-frameworks: FrameworkAdapter is a cross-module specialization of the single Adapter root, with concrete adapters specialized by external framework. FrameworkMapping specializes MappingRule and groups handoff and trace mappings without duplicating canonical actor, task, or trace concepts. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-frameworks is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-frameworks: FrameworkAdapter is a cross-module specialization of the single Adapter root, with concrete adapters specialized by external framework. FrameworkMapping specializes MappingRule and groups handoff and trace mappings without duplicating canonical actor, task, or trace concepts. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-frameworks is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 适配映射基础设施模块
labels.ja: アダプタ写像基盤モジュール

definitions.en: models shared adapter mapping records, mapping direction, conversion warnings, unsupported semantics, loss notes, approximation evidence, and source-backed conversion governance across all adapter families
definitions.zh: 适配映射基础设施模块刻画跨适配器族共享的映射规则、映射方向、转换警告、转换损失、不支持语义、近似证据和来源约束治理。
definitions.ja: アダプタ写像基盤モジュールは、アダプタ族を横断する写像規則、写像方向、変換警告、変換損失、未対応意味、近似証拠、出典制約ガバナンスを扱います。

source_claims.supports: Documents JSON Schema conversion behavior and unrepresentable input types, grounding the need to retain explicit conversion-loss warnings. The cited source does not define Moonweave's internal class or relation; that boundary remains an accepted Moonweave design inference recorded in review metadata.
source_claims.locator: JSON Schema > unrepresentable types and conversion behavior

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-mapping-infrastructure: This module exclusively owns the Adapter root. MappingArtifact groups identity-bearing mapping rules, warnings, test results, and coverage reports. Those artifacts describe, validate, or summarize adapter mappings but are not components in the Adapter specialization hierarchy. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-mapping-infrastructure is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Validation specification > Validation keywords

labels.ja: プロトコルアダプタモジュール

definitions.en: models protocol adapter mappings for MCP, A2A, FIPA, KQML, and related message, task, capability, and trust constructs without redefining canonical agent-system terms
definitions.zh: 协议适配模块刻画 MCP、A2A、FIPA、KQML 等协议中的消息、任务、能力和信任构造如何映射到规范智能体系统术语，并明确这些协议字段不能重定义核心本体。
definitions.ja: プロトコルアダプタモジュールは、MCP、A2A、FIPA、KQML などのメッセージ、タスク、能力、信頼構成を標準エージェントシステム用語へ写像する方法を扱い、プロトコル固有フィールドがコアを再定義しないことを明確にします。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-protocols: The golden chain is Adapter to InteroperabilityAdapter to ProtocolAdapter to MCPAdapter, with every is_a direction child-to-parent. A2A, FIPA, KQML, and MCP are protocol adapters. ProtocolMapping specializes MappingRule across modules, and its four children specialize by mapped subject. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-protocols is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Core concepts, Agent Card, Message, Task, and Artifact

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-protocols: The golden chain is Adapter to InteroperabilityAdapter to ProtocolAdapter to MCPAdapter, with every is_a direction child-to-parent. A2A, FIPA, KQML, and MCP are protocol adapters. ProtocolMapping specializes MappingRule across modules, and its four children specialize by mapped subject. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-protocols is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > FIPA ACL Message Structure Specification; terminology, data model, and conformance sections

labels.ja: スキーマとエクスポートアダプタモジュール

definitions.en: models structural schema, semantic graph, and language profile mappings
definitions.zh: 模式与导出适配模块刻画规范本体如何投影为结构化 JSON Schema、语义图形状、语言剖面、图谱中间表示和前端视图，并把结构验证与语义图验证分开。
definitions.ja: スキーマとエクスポートアダプタモジュールは、標準オントロジーを構造的 JSON Schema、意味グラフ形状、言語プロファイル、グラフ中間表現、フロントエンド表示へ投影し、構造検証と意味グラフ検証を分離します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-schema-export: SchemaAdapter specializes the single cross-module Adapter root, and JSON Schema, OWL, SHACL, ShEx, Zod, Pydantic, Graph IR, and frontend-view adapters specialize it by output projection. Schema annotations remain node information and create no shadow graph nodes; identity-bearing SchemaArtifact remains owned by the runtime artifact domain. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-schema-export is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > OWL 2 overview; terminology, data model, and conformance sections

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-schema-export: SchemaAdapter specializes the single cross-module Adapter root, and JSON Schema, OWL, SHACL, ShEx, Zod, Pydantic, Graph IR, and frontend-view adapters specialize it by output projection. Schema annotations remain node information and create no shadow graph nodes; identity-bearing SchemaArtifact remains owned by the runtime artifact domain. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-schema-export is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Validation specification > Validation keywords

labels.ja: 状態図アダプタモジュール

definitions.en: models statechart and state-machine mappings from XState, SCXML, and formal statechart concepts to runtime lifecycle, snapshot, transition, guard, action, and path profiles
definitions.zh: 状态图适配模块刻画 XState、SCXML 和形式化状态图中的机器、状态、转换、事件、守卫、动作、快照和路径如何映射到运行生命周期剖面，而不是把状态图字段升格为核心字段。
definitions.ja: 状態図アダプタモジュールは、XState、SCXML、形式的状態図の機械、状態、遷移、イベント、ガード、アクション、スナップショット、経路を実行ライフサイクルプロファイルへ写像し、状態図フィールドをコアへ昇格させません。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-statecharts: StatechartAdapter is a cross-module specialization of the single Adapter root, while SCXMLAdapter and XStateAdapter are genuine specializations by external statechart representation. State, event, guard, action, and final-state constructs point to canonical concepts only through mapping relations. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-statecharts is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: W3C Recommendation > State machine concepts and executable content

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of adapter-statecharts: StatechartAdapter is a cross-module specialization of the single Adapter root, while SCXMLAdapter and XStateAdapter are genuine specializations by external statechart representation. State, event, guard, action, and final-state constructs point to canonical concepts only through mapping relations. The ontology-specific boundary for adapter-statecharts is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > XState docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 能力発見と選択モジュール

definitions.en: models tool, resource, prompt, and capability search, matching, ranking, selection, disambiguation, filtering, and fallback
definitions.zh: 能力发现与选择模块刻画工具、资源、提示和能力候选如何被搜索、匹配、排序、过滤、消歧、选择或回退，避免把全部能力一次性暴露给模型。
definitions.ja: 能力発見と選択モジュールは、ツール、リソース、プロンプト、能力候補が検索、照合、順位付け、フィルタリング、曖昧性解消、選択、フォールバックされる過程を扱い、すべての能力を一度にモデルへ露出しないようにします。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-discovery-selection: Candidates, candidate sets, match assessments, discovery activities, and selection decisions are distinct categories; object-specific candidates and decisions share real anchors, while queries, fallback, and disambiguation enter through relations. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-discovery-selection is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-discovery-selection: Candidates, candidate sets, match assessments, discovery activities, and selection decisions are distinct categories; object-specific candidates and decisions share real anchors, while queries, fallback, and disambiguation enter through relations. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-discovery-selection is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 呼び出しと実行モジュール

definitions.en: models tool calls, resource reads, prompt retrieval and instantiation, programmatic calls, command execution requests, observable results, diagnostics, side effects, transcripts, and pre-execution safety checks
definitions.zh: 调用与执行模块刻画工具调用、资源读取、提示获取与实例化、程序化调用、命令执行请求、可观察结果、错误与警告诊断、副作用、转录，以及执行前安全检查。
definitions.ja: 呼び出しと実行モジュールは、ツール呼び出し、リソース読み取り、プロンプト取得とインスタンス化、プログラム的呼び出し、コマンド実行要求、観測可能な結果、エラーと警告の診断、副作用、記録、実行前安全確認を扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-invocation-execution: This module explicitly separates definition, call plan, call event, execution attempt, returned result, diagnostic, side effect, and business Outcome; is_a is reserved for same-category specialization and execution flow uses semantic relations. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-invocation-execution is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-invocation-execution: This module explicitly separates definition, call plan, call event, execution attempt, returned result, diagnostic, side effect, and business Outcome; is_a is reserved for same-category specialization and execution flow uses semantic relations. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-invocation-execution is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: MCP プロトコルサーフェスモジュール

definitions.en: models MCP client/server participants, sessions, transports, authorization, elicitation, roots, sampling, and server-exposed resources, prompts, tools, and capability metadata
definitions.zh: MCP 协议表面模块刻画 MCP 客户端与服务器参与者、会话、传输、授权、补充信息请求、根范围、采样，以及服务器暴露的资源、提示、工具和能力元数据。
definitions.ja: MCP プロトコルサーフェスモジュールは、MCP クライアントとサーバー参加者、セッション、トランスポート、認可、追加情報要求、ルート範囲、サンプリング、サーバーが公開するリソース、プロンプト、ツール、能力メタデータを扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-mcp-transport: MCP participants, sessions, transport, capabilities, definition lists, and interaction messages are modeled separately; lists are not capability subtypes, so MCPDefinitionList prevents a false hierarchy implied by the draft skeleton. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-mcp-transport is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-mcp-transport: MCP participants, sessions, transport, capabilities, definition lists, and interaction messages are modeled separately; lists are not capability subtypes, so MCPDefinitionList prevents a false hierarchy implied by the draft skeleton. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-mcp-transport is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 能力登録と定義モジュール

definitions.en: models tool, resource, prompt, API operation, and capability-surface registries, definitions, schemas, descriptors, versions, and permission declarations
definitions.zh: 能力注册与定义模块刻画工具、资源、提示模板、API 操作和能力表面的静态描述层：名称、用途、参数与结果 Schema、版本、弃用信息、权限声明和可发现元数据。
definitions.ja: 能力登録と定義モジュールは、ツール、リソース、プロンプトテンプレート、API 操作、能力サーフェスの静的記述層を扱います。名称、用途、引数と結果のスキーマ、版、非推奨情報、権限宣言、発見用メタデータを明確にします。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-registry-definition: This module separates callable implementations, registry specifications, capabilities, and metadata; only genuine tool and specification subtypes use specialization, while names, versions, and schemas become node fields. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-registry-definition is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of tool-registry-definition: This module separates callable implementations, registry specifications, capabilities, and metadata; only genuine tool and specification subtypes use specialization, while names, versions, and schemas become node fields. The ontology-specific boundary for tool-registry-definition is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: コミットと秘匿モジュール

definitions.en: models side-effect commit gates, approval and denial outcomes, rollback linkage, redaction, disclosure filtering, and audit disclosure
definitions.zh: 提交与脱敏模块同时管理副作用放行链和披露控制链：先评估写入、网络变更或外部动作是否可执行，再对敏感片段进行脱敏、抑制或审计披露。
definitions.ja: コミットと秘匿モジュールは、副作用の解放チェーンと開示制御チェーンを扱い、書き込み、ネットワーク変更、外部操作を実行してよいかを評価したうえで、機微な範囲を秘匿、抑制、監査付きで開示します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-commit-redaction: The side-effect approval chain and disclosure-control chain are modeled separately. CommitApproval, CommitDenial, and CommitGate reference cross-module PolicyDecision/Gate parents; DisclosureControlActivity contains disclosure-control activities only, while DisclosureRule to RedactionRule provides the normative specialization chain. Requests, decisions, effects, sensitive spans, and audit records are connected by relations. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-commit-redaction is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-commit-redaction: The side-effect approval chain and disclosure-control chain are modeled separately. CommitApproval, CommitDenial, and CommitGate reference cross-module PolicyDecision/Gate parents; DisclosureControlActivity contains disclosure-control activities only, while DisclosureRule to RedactionRule provides the normative specialization chain. Requests, decisions, effects, sensitive spans, and audit records are connected by relations. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-commit-redaction is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.en: models injection detection, source-sink taint propagation, tool-stream risk, memory poisoning, and pre-execution risk signals
definitions.zh: 注入防御模块把不可信来源、污点片段、来源到接收方的传播路径、工具输出注入、记忆投毒和执行前风险信号连接成可审计安全链。
definitions.ja: 注入防御モジュールは、不信頼の出典、汚染された範囲、送信元から受信先への伝播経路、ツール出力注入、メモリ汚染、実行前リスク信号を監査可能な安全チェーンとして結びます。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-injection-defense: Threat signals, poisoned content, detection activities, taint-bearing entities, risk-flow roles, and mitigation activities each form homogeneous specialization trees. Risk states, scan results, findings, propagation events, and instruction conflicts remain distinct and close through the source-to-taint-to-sink-to-finding-to-decision-to-mitigation chain. InstructionConflict is owned only here. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-injection-defense is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-injection-defense: Threat signals, poisoned content, detection activities, taint-bearing entities, risk-flow roles, and mitigation activities each form homogeneous specialization trees. Risk states, scan results, findings, propagation events, and instruction conflicts remain distinct and close through the source-to-taint-to-sink-to-finding-to-decision-to-mitigation chain. InstructionConflict is owned only here. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-injection-defense is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 権限とポリシーモジュール

definitions.en: models permission prompts, policy rules, scoped authority, decisions, grants, exceptions, and authorization outcomes
definitions.zh: 权限与策略模块描述一次操作在执行前如何被请求、评估、授权、拒绝、升级或例外放行，并把策略依据、权限范围和审计理由保留下来。
definitions.ja: 権限とポリシーモジュールは、操作が実行前にどのように要求、評価、許可、拒否、エスカレーション、例外許可されるかを表し、判断根拠、権限範囲、監査理由を保持します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-permission-policy: PolicySpecification groups policy rules and their normative components, PolicyDecision groups allow, deny, and escalation decisions, and AuthorizationArtifact groups authorization evidence. Prompts, responses, scopes, and enforcement outcomes remain distinct information objects connected by governance relations. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-permission-policy is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-permission-policy: PolicySpecification groups policy rules and their normative components, PolicyDecision groups allow, deny, and escalation decisions, and AuthorizationArtifact groups authorization evidence. Prompts, responses, scopes, and enforcement outcomes remain distinct information objects connected by governance relations. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-permission-policy is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: サンドボックスとネットワークモジュール

definitions.en: models sandbox execution boundaries, process and filesystem policy, network egress, sockets, proxies, and denied calls
definitions.zh: 沙箱与网络模块约束命令、工具调用和网络请求的执行边界，覆盖进程、文件系统、环境变量、代理路由、出口策略、凭据范围和拒绝记录。
definitions.ja: サンドボックスとネットワークモジュールは、コマンド、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求の実行境界を制約し、プロセス、ファイルシステム、環境変数、プロキシ経路、送信ポリシー、資格情報範囲、拒否記録を扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-sandbox-network: IsolationSpecification is a genuine normative parent for filesystem, process, and network policies; NetworkEndpoint is a genuine endpoint parent for proxies and sockets; NetworkInteraction covers network-operation events only. Requests, responses, routes, resources, and risks retain their own ontological categories and close the loop through causal and governance relations. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-sandbox-network is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-sandbox-network: IsolationSpecification is a genuine normative parent for filesystem, process, and network policies; NetworkEndpoint is a genuine endpoint parent for proxies and sockets; NetworkInteraction covers network-operation events only. Requests, responses, routes, resources, and risks retain their own ontological categories and close the loop through causal and governance relations. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-sandbox-network is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.en: models trust boundaries, authority scopes, data zones, and auditable boundary-crossing events
definitions.zh: 信任边界模块定义身份、权限、可见性、数据分区与责任假设发生变化的位置，并记录控制、消息、产物或权限跨越边界时所需的审计证据。
definitions.ja: 信頼境界モジュールは、識別、権限、可視性、データ区分、責任の前提が変化する位置を定義し、制御、メッセージ、成果物、権限が境界を越える際の監査証跡を記録します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-trust-boundary: TrustBoundary has verifiable InternalBoundary and ExternalBoundary specializations. Network, remote-agent, and tool boundaries specialize TrustBoundary directly because they are not external in every valid instance. BoundaryCrossing, DataZone, and AuthorityScope close the audit model through semantic relations rather than false subclassing. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-trust-boundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of safety-trust-boundary: TrustBoundary has verifiable InternalBoundary and ExternalBoundary specializations. Network, remote-agent, and tool boundaries specialize TrustBoundary directly because they are not external in every valid instance. BoundaryCrossing, DataZone, and AuthorityScope close the audit model through semantic relations rather than false subclassing. The ontology-specific boundary for safety-trust-boundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.en: Telemetry, Audit And Export Pipeline Module
labels.zh: 遥测、审计与导出管线模块
labels.ja: テレメトリ、監査、エクスポートパイプラインモジュール

definitions.en: models logs, telemetry signals, audit logs, trace exports, listeners, subscriptions, streams, and event sinks as the observability pipeline derived from runtime trace evidence
definitions.zh: 遥测、审计与导出管线模块将日志、遥测信号、审计日志、轨迹导出、监听器、订阅、流和事件接收端建模为从运行轨迹证据派生的可观测性管线。
definitions.ja: テレメトリ、監査、エクスポートパイプラインモジュールは、ログ、テレメトリ信号、監査ログ、トレースエクスポート、リスナー、購読、ストリーム、イベントシンクを、実行トレース証拠から派生する観測可能性パイプラインとして扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of feedback-logging: Log information artifacts, consumers, streams, subscriptions, and exports are separated; LogRecord and TraceExport are artifacts, listeners and sinks are consumers, while TelemetryEvent and AuditLog retain event/collection categories. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-logging is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of feedback-logging: Log information artifacts, consumers, streams, subscriptions, and exports are separated; LogRecord and TraceExport are artifacts, listeners and sinks are consumers, while TelemetryEvent and AuditLog retain event/collection categories. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-logging is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Tracing guide > Traces, spans, and trace processors

labels.ja: 指標と評価モジュール

definitions.en: models generic metrics, evaluation runs, rubrics, scores, success criteria, and evaluation evidence while benchmark-specific task conditions, stress dimensions, and public ranking semantics remain in the adapter layer
definitions.zh: 指标与评估模块描述通用指标、评估运行、评分规程、分数、成功准则和评估证据；基准专属场景、压力轴和排行榜语义保留在适配器层。
definitions.ja: 指標と評価モジュールは、汎用指標、評価実行、ルーブリック、スコア、成功基準、評価証拠を扱います。ベンチマーク固有のシナリオ、圧力軸、ランキング意味論はアダプター層に残します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of feedback-metrics-evaluation: Evaluation specifications, evaluation runs, Metric definitions, and observed Measurements are separated; Score is a Measurement, while cost, latency, robustness, and safety metrics are Metric subtypes. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-metrics-evaluation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of feedback-metrics-evaluation: Evaluation specifications, evaluation runs, Metric definitions, and observed Measurements are separated; Score is a Measurement, while cost, latency, robustness, and safety metrics are Metric subtypes. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-metrics-evaluation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.ja: レビューと最適化モジュール

definitions.en: models feedback evidence, human and automated review, review findings, corrections, learning signals, optimization loops, and feedback-triggered recovery paths
definitions.zh: 审查与优化模块描述反馈证据、人工审查、自动审查、审查发现、修正、学习信号、优化循环和由反馈触发的恢复路径。
definitions.ja: レビューと最適化モジュールは、フィードバック証拠、人手レビュー、自動レビュー、レビュー所見、修正、学習信号、最適化ループ、フィードバック起点の復旧経路を扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of feedback-review-optimization: Review activities, review records, findings, feedback, correction activities, recovery plans, and optimization loops retain distinct identities; human/automated review and correction/recovery/rollback form genuine specialization chains. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-review-optimization is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of feedback-review-optimization: Review activities, review records, findings, feedback, correction activities, recovery plans, and optimization loops retain distinct identities; human/automated review and correction/recovery/rollback form genuine specialization chains. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-review-optimization is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Tracing guide > Traces, spans, and trace processors

labels.ja: 警告とエラーモジュール

definitions.en: models warning records, error events, diagnostic messages, failure modes, risk bridge signals, and uncertainty evidence derived from observable runtime evidence
definitions.zh: 警告与错误模块描述从可观察运行证据派生的警告记录、错误事件、诊断消息、失败模式、风险桥接信号和不确定性证据。
definitions.ja: 警告とエラーモジュールは、観測可能な実行証拠から導かれる警告記録、エラーイベント、診断メッセージ、失敗モード、リスク橋渡し信号、不確実性証拠を扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of feedback-warning-error: Diagnostic signals, occurring failure/warning events, failure modes, and ordered error streams are separated; BlockingError and RetryableError are reviewed as failure modes rather than being confused with occurrences. The ontology-specific boundary for feedback-warning-error is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.ja: 分割と位置付けモジュール

definitions.en: models memory-oriented chunking, chunk metadata, situating prompts, and document-local grounding used before retrieval and context assembly
definitions.zh: 分块与定位模块描述面向记忆使用的文档切分、分块边界、分块元数据、定位提示和文档内锚定，使材料在检索、重排序和上下文组装之前保持可追溯的来源位置与语义边界。
definitions.ja: 分割と位置付けモジュールは、記憶利用に向けた文書分割、チャンク境界、チャンクメタデータ、位置付けプロンプト、文書内根拠付けを扱い、検索、再順位付け、文脈組立の前に材料の出典位置と意味境界を追跡可能に保ちます。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-chunking-situating: ChunkArtifact to Chunk to SituatedChunk forms a content-specialization chain, with ChunkReference as addressable chunk information. ChunkMetadata groups boundaries, overlaps, provenance, quality signals, and context notes, while ChunkProcessingActivity groups chunking, situating, and compression activities. Explicit relations connect documents, runs, chunks, source spans, and quality rather than treating process adjacency as inheritance. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-chunking-situating is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-chunking-situating: ChunkArtifact to Chunk to SituatedChunk forms a content-specialization chain, with ChunkReference as addressable chunk information. Explicit relations connect documents, runs, chunks, source spans, and quality rather than treating process adjacency as inheritance. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-chunking-situating is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.en: models context windows, context assembly, summaries, and preference-guided memory inclusion
definitions.zh: 上下文组装模块描述运行上下文窗口、上下文槽位、预算、来源、摘要、刷新、排除和排序规则，决定哪些记忆记录、检索结果、消息、运行观测和指令可以进入下一次模型调用或智能体步骤。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト組立モジュールは、実行コンテキストウィンドウ、文脈スロット、予算、出典、要約、更新、除外、順序規則を扱い、どの記憶レコード、検索結果、メッセージ、実行観測、指示が次のモデル呼び出しまたはエージェントステップへ入るかを決定します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-context: ContextArtifact groups windows, summaries, slots, and source descriptors, while ContextRule groups ordering and budget specifications only. ContextExclusion remains an exclusion decision rather than a rule subtype, and ContextAssembly and ContextRefreshEvent remain an activity and event. ContextPackage stays uniquely owned by Info; Memory references it only through produces, refreshes, and delivered_to relations. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-context is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-context: ContextArtifact groups windows, summaries, slots, and source descriptors, while ContextRule groups ordering and budget specifications only. labels.ja: 埋め込みと索引モジュール

definitions.en: models vector and lexical indexes used to retrieve memory
definitions.zh: 嵌入与索引模块描述用于检索记忆的向量、词汇、图表征、索引条目、索引键和刷新事件。
definitions.ja: 埋め込みと索引モジュールは、記憶検索に使われるベクトル、語彙、グラフ表現、索引エントリ、索引キー、更新イベントを記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-embedding-indexes: Representation→Embedding→TextEmbedding/GraphEmbedding separates semantic representation from VectorRepresentation→DenseVector/SparseVector/EmbeddingVector, with EmbeddingVector using valid multiple inheritance. Index→VectorIndex/HybridIndex/TfIdfIndex contains index kinds only, while IndexActivity contains representation or index construction activities only. Versions, shards, entries, keys, and VectorDatabase connect through part_of, version_of, hosts, and supersedes rather than false IndexVersion subclassing. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-embedding-indexes is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

labels.ja: 記憶取り込みモジュール

definitions.en: models source loading, document preparation, attachment, metadata, deduplication, and ingestion events that make external or internal material eligible for memory use
definitions.zh: 记忆摄入模块描述来源加载、文档准备、附件、元数据、去重和摄入事件，用于判断外部或内部材料能否进入记忆使用流程。
definitions.ja: 記憶取り込みモジュールは、外部または内部の素材を記憶利用の候補にするための出典読み込み、文書準備、添付、メタデータ、重複排除、取り込みイベントを記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-ingestion: IngestibleResource groups only addressable resources that memory ingestion can read. Ingestion activities, loading capabilities, policies, metadata, and deduplication events retain their ontological categories and close the source-to-MemoryRecord loop through reads, uses, governed_by, produces, and writes. The legacy generic Resource is merged into this bounded anchor to avoid conflation with tool capability resources. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-ingestion is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-ingestion: IngestibleResource groups only addressable resources that memory ingestion can read. labels.zh: 记忆生命周期操作模块
labels.ja: 記憶ライフサイクル操作モジュール

definitions.en: models agentic memory operations that write, update, delete, discard, merge, consolidate, compact, expire, validate, supersede, reflect on, and audit memory records before they influence future context or behavior
definitions.zh: 记忆生命周期操作模块描述记忆记录影响未来上下文或行为之前，对其执行写入、更新、删除、丢弃、合并、巩固、压缩、过期、验证、取代、反思和审计的智能体记忆操作。
definitions.ja: 記憶ライフサイクル操作モジュールは、記憶レコードが将来のコンテキストや振る舞いへ影響する前に行われる、書き込み、更新、削除、破棄、統合、集約、圧縮、期限切れ、検証、置換、反省、監査のエージェント的記憶操作を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-lifecycle: MemoryOperation provides a common activity contract for write, update, merge, delete, discard, eviction, expiration, supersession, compaction, consolidation, validation, reflection, and decay. MemoryAuditEvent remains an event and MemoryConflict remains a state/record. Every modifying activity uses consumes, produces, and supersedes to create new versions while preserving old records for audit rather than mutating in place. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-lifecycle is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Paper > Agentic Memory; abstract and method or system-architecture sections

labels.ja: 検索と順位付けモジュール

definitions.en: models memory retrieval queries, candidate sets, scoring, reranking, rank fusion, and selection decisions before context inclusion
definitions.zh: 检索与排序模块描述从记忆索引和记忆记录中召回候选内容、计算语义或词汇相关性、重排序、融合分数并在进入上下文之前做选择的过程。
definitions.ja: 検索と順位付けモジュールは、記憶索引と記憶レコードから候補を取り出し、意味的または語彙的関連度を計算し、再順位付け、スコア融合、文脈投入前の選択を行う過程を扱います。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-retrieval-ranking: RetrievalArtifact groups retrieval information such as queries, candidate sets, candidate chunks, and final retrieved chunks, while RetrievedChunk does not inherit CandidateChunk. LexicalScore, SimilarityScore, and RerankScore reference the single Info-owned RetrievalScore as their common cross-module parent, eliminating duplicate score roots. RankingOperation groups RankFusion and TopKSelection. Directional edges connect filters, index versions, scoring, ranking, selection, and traces into a replayable loop. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-retrieval-ranking is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

labels.en: Memory Store, Scope And Typology Module
labels.zh: 记忆存储、范围与类型模块
labels.ja: 記憶ストア、スコープ、類型モジュール

definitions.en: models persistent and session-scoped memory stores, namespaces, access scopes, memory records, retention policy, and memory type taxonomy across working, short-term, long-term, episodic, semantic, procedural, reflective, preference, task, session, and cross-session memory
definitions.zh: 记忆存储、范围与类型模块描述持久和会话级记忆库、命名空间、访问范围、记忆记录、保留策略，以及工作记忆、短期记忆、长期记忆、情景记忆、语义记忆、程序记忆、反思记忆、偏好记忆、任务记忆、会话记忆和跨会话记忆的类型体系。
definitions.ja: 記憶ストア、スコープ、類型モジュールは、永続およびセッション単位の記憶ストア、名前空間、アクセス範囲、記憶レコード、保持ポリシーと、作業記憶、短期記憶、長期記憶、エピソード記憶、意味記憶、手続き記憶、反省記憶、選好記憶、タスク記憶、セッション記憶、クロスセッション記憶の類型を記述します。

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-stores-scopes: MemoryEntity provides a homogeneous information-entity root for MemoryRecord, MemoryItem, and MemoryFile, while MemoryStore, MemoryNamespace, MemoryScope, and MemoryRetentionPolicy connect through storage and governance relations. The orthogonal kind, duration, and scope dimensions no longer form a false inheritance tree; they become three controlled fields on MemoryRecord. PreferenceMemory becomes a kind value and duplicate MemoryPreference is merged into the same record representation. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-stores-scopes is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed Module boundary of memory-stores-scopes: MemoryEntity provides a homogeneous information-entity root for MemoryRecord, MemoryItem, and MemoryFile, while MemoryStore, MemoryNamespace, MemoryScope, and MemoryRetentionPolicy connect through storage and governance relations. The orthogonal kind, duration, and scope dimensions no longer form a false inheritance tree; they become three controlled fields on MemoryRecord. PreferenceMemory becomes a kind value and duplicate MemoryPreference is merged into the same record representation. The ontology-specific boundary for memory-stores-scopes is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

short_definitions.zh: 命令输出观测记录作为上下文摄入证据的可观察命令输出，同时不拥有产生该输出的命令执行或容器。
short_definitions.en: records observable command output as context-ingress evidence without owning the command execution or container that produced it.
short_definitions.ja: コマンド出力観測は、コンテキスト取り込み証拠としての観測可能なコマンド出力を記録し、その出力を生んだ実行やコンテナ自体は所有しません。

definitions.en: records observable command output as context-ingress evidence without owning the command execution or container that produced it.

why_needed.en: command output observation provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact CommandOutputObservation-has_exit_status_observation-ExitStatusObservation (CommandOutputObservation has_exit_status_observation ExitStatusObservation) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ExitStatusObservation.

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed distinction of CommandOutputObservation: Every CommandOutputObservation is an ExecutionObservation whose observed subject is visible command output. The ontology-specific boundary for CommandOutputObservation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

short_definitions.zh: 上下文摄入事件记录消息、指令、来源片段、检索候选、工具观测、执行输出或摘要产物进入某次模型调用或智能体步骤可见上下文的可观察时刻。
short_definitions.en: observable event in which a message, instruction, source span, retrieved candidate, tool observation, execution output, or summarized artifact becomes available to a model call or agent step.
short_definitions.ja: コンテキスト取り込みイベントは、メッセージ、指示、出典断片、検索候補、ツール観測、実行出力、要約成果物がモデル呼び出しまたはエージェント手順の可視コンテキストになる観測可能な時点を記録します。

short_definitions.en: references a runtime environment binding relevant to observed execution output without exposing hidden or secret values by default.
short_definitions.ja: 環境束縛参照は、観測された実行出力に関係する実行環境の束縛を記録し、隠れた値や秘密値は既定では公開しません。
