definitions.zh: 引用锚精确锚定支撑某项主张的来源片段。
definitions.en: A citation anchor precisely anchors the source span supporting a claim.
definitions.ja: 引用アンカーは主張を支える出典範囲を正確に固定します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed anchors relation from CitationAnchor to SourceSpan. The ontology-specific boundary for CitationAnchor-anchors-SourceSpan is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed anchors relation from CitationAnchor to SourceSpan. The ontology-specific boundary for CitationAnchor-anchors-SourceSpan is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.zh: 引用锚 是一种 来源锚。区分特征：任一引用锚都是专门为一项可见主张绑定精确 SourceSpan 的 SourceAnchor。
definitions.en: citation anchor is a kind of source anchor. Reviewed differentia: Every CitationAnchor is a SourceAnchor specialized to bind a visible claim to a precise SourceSpan.
definitions.ja: 引用アンカー は 出典アンカー の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての CitationAnchor は可視主張を正確な SourceSpan へ結ぶことに特化した SourceAnchor です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from CitationAnchor to SourceAnchor. The ontology-specific boundary for CitationAnchor-is_a-SourceAnchor is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from CitationAnchor to SourceAnchor. The ontology-specific boundary for CitationAnchor-is_a-SourceAnchor is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 内容摘要 是一种 来源身份信息。区分特征：任一内容摘要都是从来源内容计算并用于判同、缓存或完整性检查的 SourceIdentity。
definitions.en: content digest is a kind of source identity information. Reviewed differentia: Every ContentDigest is a SourceIdentity computed from source content for equivalence, caching, or integrity checks.
definitions.ja: 内容ダイジェスト は 出典同一性情報 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての ContentDigest は出典内容から計算し同一性・キャッシュ・完全性確認に使う SourceIdentity です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ContentDigest to SourceIdentity. The ontology-specific boundary for ContentDigest-is_a-SourceIdentity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ContentDigest to SourceIdentity. The ontology-specific boundary for ContentDigest-is_a-SourceIdentity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 数据库行引用 是一种 来源引用。区分特征：任一数据库行引用都是以行、查询结果或表切片为指称对象的 SourceReference。
definitions.en: database row reference is a kind of source reference. Reviewed differentia: Every DatabaseRowReference is a SourceReference whose referent is a row, query result, or table slice.
definitions.ja: データベース行参照 は 出典参照 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての DatabaseRowReference は行・クエリ結果・表切片を指示対象とする SourceReference です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from DatabaseRowReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for DatabaseRowReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from DatabaseRowReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for DatabaseRowReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 数据区引用指向 Safety 域唯一 DataZone，而不复制数据区分类。
definitions.en: A data-zone reference points to the sole DataZone in Safety without duplicating its classification.
definitions.ja: データ区域参照は分類を複製せず Safety の唯一の DataZone を指します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed refers_to relation from DataZoneReference to DataZone. The ontology-specific boundary for DataZoneReference-refers_to-DataZone is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.zh: 文件资源引用 是一种 来源引用。区分特征：任一文件资源引用都是以路径、URI、版本、摘要或片段定位文件的 SourceReference。
definitions.en: file resource reference is a kind of source reference. Reviewed differentia: Every FileResourceReference is a SourceReference locating a file by path, URI, version, digest, or span.
definitions.ja: ファイル資源参照 は 出典参照 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての FileResourceReference はパス・URI・版・摘要・範囲でファイルを特定する SourceReference です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from FileResourceReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for FileResourceReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.zh: 图节点引用 是一种 来源引用。区分特征：任一图节点引用都是以图标识和节点标识定位图中来源对象的 SourceReference。
definitions.en: graph node reference is a kind of source reference. Reviewed differentia: Every GraphNodeReference is a SourceReference locating a graph source object by graph and node identifiers.
definitions.ja: グラフノード参照 は 出典参照 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての GraphNodeReference はグラフ識別子とノード識別子でグラフ出典対象を特定する SourceReference です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from GraphNodeReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for GraphNodeReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.en: links a source reference to a digest used to detect content drift after ingestion or context staging.
definitions.zh: 将来源引用连接到用于检测摄入或上下文暂存后内容漂移的摘要值。
definitions.ja: 出典参照を、取り込みまたはコンテキストのステージング後の内容ドリフト検出に用いるダイジェストへ結び付けます。

source_claims.supports: RFC 9530 standardizes Content-Digest and Repr-Digest fields for integrity digests of HTTP message content and representations; Moonweave maps a recorded digest to has_checksum.
source_claims.locator: RFC 9530 > Sections 2-4

definitions.en: links a source reference to the exact span, row, range, page, line, offset, or anchor used as evidence.
definitions.zh: 将来源引用连接到用作证据的精确片段、行、范围、页、行号、偏移或锚点。
definitions.ja: 出典参照を、根拠として用いた正確な範囲、行、レンジ、ページ、行番号、オフセット、またはアンカーへ結び付けます。

source_claims.supports: PROV-O defines provenance entities and relations for derivation, attribution, specialization, and source-bearing records; Moonweave defines the reviewed source-reference predicate and endpoint direction.
source_claims.locator: PROV-O Recommendation > Classes and Properties Defined in PROV-O

definitions.en: links a source reference to the version, revision, snapshot, commit, or release that was cited.
definitions.zh: 将来源引用连接到所引用的版本、修订、快照、提交或发布版本。
definitions.ja: 出典参照を、引用されたバージョン、リビジョン、スナップショット、コミット、またはリリースへ結び付けます。

source_claims.supports: PROV-O defines provenance entities and relations for derivation, attribution, specialization, and source-bearing records; Moonweave defines the reviewed source-reference predicate and endpoint direction.
source_claims.locator: PROV-O Recommendation > Classes and Properties Defined in PROV-O

definitions.zh: 网络来源引用 是一种 来源引用。区分特征：任一网络来源引用都是以端点、请求或响应来源为指称对象并保留边界元数据的 SourceReference。
definitions.en: network source reference is a kind of source reference. Reviewed differentia: Every NetworkSourceReference is a SourceReference whose referent is endpoint-, request-, or response-originated content with boundary metadata.
definitions.ja: ネットワーク出典参照 は 出典参照 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての NetworkSourceReference は端点・要求・応答由来内容を境界メタデータ付きで指す SourceReference です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from NetworkSourceReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for NetworkSourceReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from NetworkSourceReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for NetworkSourceReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: source reference belongs to data zone
labels.en: source reference belongs to data zone
labels.ja: source reference belongs to data zone

definitions.en: links a source reference to the data zone that governs its classification, trust, retention, memory use, tool exposure, and disclosure routing.
definitions.zh: 该关系把来源引用连接到治理其分类、信任、保留、记忆使用、工具暴露和披露路由的数据区。
definitions.ja: この関係は、出典参照を、その分類、信頼、保持、メモリ利用、ツール公開、開示経路を統制するデータ区域に結びます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed source_reference_belongs_to_data_zone relation from SourceReference to DataZone. The ontology-specific boundary for source_reference_belongs_to_data_zone is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed source_reference_belongs_to_data_zone relation from SourceReference to DataZone. The ontology-specific boundary for source_reference_belongs_to_data_zone is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Tracing guide > Traces, spans, and trace processors

definitions.zh: 稳定来源锚用于在分块、渲染或修订后重新识别片段。
definitions.en: A stable source anchor reidentifies a span after chunking, rendering, or revision.
definitions.ja: 安定出典アンカーは分割・描画・改訂後に範囲を再識別します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed reidentifies relation from SourceAnchor to SourceSpan. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceAnchor-reidentifies-SourceSpan is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

definitions.en: source cell range is a kind of source location. Reviewed differentia: Every SourceCellRange is a SourceLocation distinguished by table, sheet, or matrix cell coordinates.
definitions.ja: 出典セル範囲 は 出典位置 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SourceCellRange は表・シート・行列セル座標で区別される SourceLocation です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceCellRange to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceCellRange-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.zh: 来源校验和 是一种 内容摘要。区分特征：任一来源校验和都是使用明确校验算法生成的 ContentDigest，区分特征是面向变更检测与完整性验证。
definitions.en: source checksum is a kind of content digest. Reviewed differentia: Every SourceChecksum is a ContentDigest generated by an explicit checksum algorithm and used for change detection and integrity verification.
definitions.ja: 出典チェックサム は 内容ダイジェスト の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SourceChecksum は明示的チェックサム算法で生成し変更検知・完全性確認に使う ContentDigest です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceChecksum to ContentDigest. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceChecksum-is_a-ContentDigest is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceChecksum to ContentDigest. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceChecksum-is_a-ContentDigest is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.zh: 来源行范围 是一种 来源位置。区分特征：任一来源行范围都是用起止行号定位代码、日志或文本的 SourceLocation。
definitions.en: source line range is a kind of source location. Reviewed differentia: Every SourceLineRange is a SourceLocation using start and end line numbers for code, logs, or text.
definitions.ja: 出典行範囲 は 出典位置 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SourceLineRange は開始・終了行番号でコード・ログ・文書を特定する SourceLocation です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceLineRange to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceLineRange-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceLineRange to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceLineRange-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 来源偏移 是一种 来源位置。区分特征：任一来源偏移都是用字节、字符、词元或结构位置定位的 SourceLocation。
definitions.en: source offset is a kind of source location. Reviewed differentia: Every SourceOffset is a SourceLocation expressed in byte, character, token, or structural coordinates.
definitions.ja: 出典オフセット は 出典位置 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SourceOffset はバイト・文字・トークン・構造座標で表す SourceLocation です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceOffset to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceOffset-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceOffset to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceOffset-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 来源页范围 是一种 来源位置。区分特征：任一来源页范围都是用起止页定位分页文档的 SourceLocation。
definitions.en: source page range is a kind of source location. Reviewed differentia: Every SourcePageRange is a SourceLocation using start and end pages for a paginated document.
definitions.ja: 出典頁範囲 は 出典位置 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SourcePageRange は開始・終了頁でページ文書を特定する SourceLocation です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourcePageRange to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourcePageRange-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourcePageRange to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourcePageRange-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.zh: 访问路径描述如何解析来源，但不把路径当成来源子类。
definitions.en: An access path describes how the source is resolved without becoming a source subtype.
definitions.ja: アクセス経路は出典の解決方法を記述し、出典の下位型にはなりません。

source_claims.supports: The MCP specification defines message content blocks and URI-addressed resources; Moonweave maps those protocol constructs to the reviewed information relation.
source_claims.locator: MCP Specification 2025-11-25 > Content blocks and Resources

definitions.zh: 资源描述符提供类型、访问提示和信任元数据，来源引用仍保持稳定身份。
definitions.en: A resource descriptor supplies type, access hints, and trust metadata while the source reference keeps stable identity.
definitions.ja: 資源記述子は型・アクセス手掛り・信頼メタデータを提供し、出典参照は安定同一性を保ちます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed described_by relation from SourceReference to ResourceDescriptor. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceReference-described_by-ResourceDescriptor is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed described_by relation from SourceReference to ResourceDescriptor. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceReference-described_by-ResourceDescriptor is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 来源引用关联版本或内容指纹，使同一定位在修订后仍可判别。
definitions.en: A source reference links to version or content identity so the same locator remains distinguishable after revision.
definitions.ja: 出典参照は版または内容同一性へ結び付き、改訂後も同一ロケータを識別できます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed has_identity relation from SourceReference to SourceIdentity. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceReference-has_identity-SourceIdentity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed has_identity relation from SourceReference to SourceIdentity. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceReference-has_identity-SourceIdentity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 来源引用保留采集、转换和信任来源的可审计来历。
definitions.en: A source reference retains auditable provenance for acquisition, transformation, and trust origin.
definitions.ja: 出典参照は取得・変換・信頼起源の監査可能来歴を保持します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed has_provenance relation from SourceReference to SourceProvenance. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceReference-has_provenance-SourceProvenance is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed has_provenance relation from SourceReference to SourceProvenance. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceReference-has_provenance-SourceProvenance is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 来源引用通过位置对象给出路径、页、行、单元格或偏移范围。
definitions.en: A source reference uses a location object to state path, page, line, cell, or offset extent.
definitions.ja: 出典参照は位置オブジェクトでパス・頁・行・セル・オフセット範囲を示します。

source_claims.supports: PROV-O defines provenance entities and relations for derivation, attribution, specialization, and source-bearing records; Moonweave defines the reviewed source-reference predicate and endpoint direction.
source_claims.locator: PROV-O Recommendation > Classes and Properties Defined in PROV-O

definitions.zh: 来源片段 是一种 来源位置。区分特征：任一来源片段都是具有明确起止边界、用于支撑内容块或主张的 SourceLocation。
definitions.en: source span is a kind of source location. Reviewed differentia: Every SourceSpan is a SourceLocation with explicit start and end boundaries supporting a content block or claim.
definitions.ja: 出典範囲 は 出典位置 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SourceSpan は内容ブロックや主張を支える明示開始・終了境界付き SourceLocation です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceSpan to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceSpan-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceSpan to SourceLocation. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceSpan-is_a-SourceLocation is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 来源版本 是一种 来源身份信息。区分特征：任一来源版本都是以修订、时间戳、提交、快照或发布标识区分来源状态的 SourceIdentity。
definitions.en: source version is a kind of source identity information. Reviewed differentia: Every SourceVersion is a SourceIdentity distinguishing source state by revision, timestamp, commit, snapshot, or release identifier.
definitions.ja: 出典版 は 出典同一性情報 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SourceVersion は改訂・時刻・コミット・スナップショット・リリース識別子で出典状態を区別する SourceIdentity です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceVersion to SourceIdentity. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceVersion-is_a-SourceIdentity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SourceVersion to SourceIdentity. The ontology-specific boundary for SourceVersion-is_a-SourceIdentity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 文本文档引用 是一种 来源引用。区分特征：任一文本文档引用都是以 TextDocument 为指称对象并携带位置、版本或摘要的 SourceReference。
definitions.en: text document reference is a kind of source reference. Reviewed differentia: Every TextDocumentReference is a SourceReference whose referent is a TextDocument and that carries location, version, or digest.
definitions.ja: テキスト文書参照 は 出典参照 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての TextDocumentReference は TextDocument を指し位置・版・摘要を持つ SourceReference です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from TextDocumentReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for TextDocumentReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from TextDocumentReference to SourceReference. The ontology-specific boundary for TextDocumentReference-is_a-SourceReference is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 文本文档引用与被引用文档分开，允许引用携带不同位置和版本。
definitions.en: A text-document reference remains distinct from its referent so it can carry a particular location and version.
definitions.ja: 文書参照と被参照文書を分離し、参照ごとの位置と版を保持します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed refers_to relation from TextDocumentReference to TextDocument. The ontology-specific boundary for TextDocumentReference-refers_to-TextDocument is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed refers_to relation from TextDocumentReference to TextDocument. The ontology-specific boundary for TextDocumentReference-refers_to-TextDocument is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 信任边界引用指向 Safety 域 canonical TrustBoundary，保留来源路径的治理上下文。

definitions.en: human operator is a kind of human actor. Reviewed differentia: A HumanOperator is a HumanActor distinguished by the ability to pause, resume, redirect, or supply missing information.

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ProtocolTrustMapping to ProtocolMapping. The ontology-specific boundary for ProtocolTrustMapping-is_a-ProtocolMapping is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Specification > Core concepts, Agent Card, Message, Task, and Artifact

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ProtocolTrustMapping to ProtocolMapping. The ontology-specific boundary for ProtocolTrustMapping-is_a-ProtocolMapping is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

definitions.zh: 协议身份、授权和不透明性元数据映射到信任边界语义。

definitions.zh: 失败尝试可输出错误诊断。
definitions.en: A failed attempt can emit an error diagnostic.
definitions.ja: 失敗した試行はエラー診断を出力できる。

definitions.ja: ツール呼び出し試行 は 呼び出し試行 の一種です。審査済みの種差：ToolCallAttempt は独自の回数と状態を持つ、ツール呼び出しに対する InvocationAttempt の一種である。

definitions.zh: 工具调用计划 是一种 调用规范。区分特征：工具调用计划是规定拟用工具、参数、审批与重试的一种 InvocationSpecification；计划不是调用事件。

definitions.ja: ツール呼び出し計画 は 呼び出し仕様 の一種です。審査済みの種差：ToolCallPlan は予定ツール・引数・承認・再試行を定める InvocationSpecification の一種であり、呼び出し事象ではない。

definitions.zh: 计划描述拟执行调用，尚未发生调用。

definitions.zh: 工具调用重试 是一种 工具调用尝试。区分特征：重试具有新的 attempt identity 且完整满足 ToolCallAttempt，只额外引用先前失败。
definitions.en: Tool Call Retry is a kind of Tool Call Attempt. Reviewed differentia: A retry has a new attempt identity and fully satisfies ToolCallAttempt while additionally referencing the prior failure.
definitions.ja: ツール呼び出し再試行 は ツール呼び出し試行 の一種です。審査済みの種差：再試行は新しい attempt identity を持ち ToolCallAttempt を完全に満たし、先行失敗への参照だけを追加する。

source_claims.locator: Specification > Architecture, base protocol, and server features

definitions.zh: 重试是由先前尝试触发的新尝试。

definitions.en: tool error is a kind of Invocation Diagnostic. Reviewed differentia: ToolError is an InvocationDiagnostic recording call failure, not a ToolResult or the failure occurrence itself.
definitions.ja: ツールエラー は 呼び出し診断 の一種です。審査済みの種差：ToolError は呼び出し失敗を記録する InvocationDiagnostic の一種であり、ToolResult や失敗事象そのものではない。

definitions.en: quarantine action is a kind of mitigation action. Reviewed differentia: QuarantineAction is a MitigationAction distinguished by removing suspect content from normal context or execution flow.

definitions.zh: 风险接收方 是一种 风险流角色。区分特征：风险汇是受保护目的对象在 source-sink 分析中承担的角色，而非固定实体类型。

definitions.zh: 净化处置 是一种 缓解活动。区分特征：净化处置是通过移除、改写、屏蔽或缩窄不安全内容来降低风险的 MitigationAction。
definitions.en: sanitization action is a kind of mitigation action. Reviewed differentia: SanitizationAction is a MitigationAction distinguished by removing, rewriting, masking, or narrowing unsafe content.

definitions.en: safety relation that checks text, output, stream, or command content for injection patterns
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为模式扫描，值域为注入签名；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。

definitions.en: tool stream injection signal is a kind of threat signal. Reviewed differentia: ToolStreamInjectionSignal is a ThreatSignal distinguished by streamed tool-output origin and attempted influence on later actions.

definitions.zh: 外部边界 是一种 信任边界。区分特征：任一外部边界都是把受控系统与外部主体或服务分开的信任边界，符合 genus 加区分特征。
definitions.en: external boundary is a kind of trust boundary. Reviewed differentia: Every ExternalBoundary is a TrustBoundary distinguished by separating the controlled system from an external party or service.
definitions.ja: 外部境界 は 信頼境界 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての ExternalBoundary は制御系を外部主体・サービスから分けるという差異を持つ TrustBoundary です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ExternalBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for ExternalBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ExternalBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for ExternalBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 内部边界 是一种 信任边界。区分特征：任一内部边界都是受控系统内部信任假设变化处的 TrustBoundary。
definitions.en: internal boundary is a kind of trust boundary. Reviewed differentia: Every InternalBoundary is a TrustBoundary at which trust assumptions change inside the controlled system.
definitions.ja: 内部境界 は 信頼境界 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての InternalBoundary は制御系内部で信頼前提が変化する TrustBoundary です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from InternalBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for InternalBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from InternalBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for InternalBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 网络边界 是一种 信任边界。区分特征：网络边界是由网络可达性或传输面区分的信任边界；内部网段之间也可成立，因此不挂到 ExternalBoundary。
definitions.en: network boundary is a kind of trust boundary. Reviewed differentia: NetworkBoundary is a TrustBoundary distinguished by network reachability or transport surface; it can also exist between internal segments, so it is not placed under ExternalBoundary.
definitions.ja: ネットワーク境界 は 信頼境界 の一種です。審査済みの種差：NetworkBoundary はネットワーク到達性・転送面で区別される TrustBoundary で、内部区画間にも成立するため ExternalBoundary 配下には置きません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from NetworkBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for NetworkBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from NetworkBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for NetworkBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 远程智能体边界 是一种 信任边界。区分特征：远程智能体边界以远程主体的不透明身份、权限和责任为区分特征；受同组织控制的远程主体未必是 ExternalBoundary。
definitions.en: remote agent boundary is a kind of trust boundary. Reviewed differentia: RemoteAgentBoundary specializes TrustBoundary by remote-actor identity, authority, opacity, and accountability; a remotely hosted actor need not be external to the organization.
definitions.ja: 遠隔エージェント境界 は 信頼境界 の一種です。審査済みの種差：RemoteAgentBoundary は遠隔主体の識別・権限・不透明性・責任で TrustBoundary を特殊化し、遠隔配置でも組織外とは限りません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from RemoteAgentBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for RemoteAgentBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from RemoteAgentBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for RemoteAgentBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 工具边界 是一种 信任边界。区分特征：工具边界是意图转为可执行调用或工具输出返回时的 TrustBoundary；本地工具同样可形成该边界，故不从属于 ExternalBoundary。
definitions.en: tool boundary is a kind of trust boundary. Reviewed differentia: ToolBoundary is a TrustBoundary where intent becomes an executable call or tool output returns; local tools can create it, so it does not specialize ExternalBoundary.
definitions.ja: ツール境界 は 信頼境界 の一種です。審査済みの種差：ToolBoundary は意図が実行呼出しになる、またはツール出力が戻る位置の TrustBoundary で、ローカルツールでも成立するため ExternalBoundary の下位にはしません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ToolBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for ToolBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ToolBoundary to TrustBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for ToolBoundary-is_a-TrustBoundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > NSA MCP Security Design Considerations heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_derived_from_document relation from Chunk to Document. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_derived_from_document is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_derived_from_document relation from Chunk to Document. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_derived_from_document is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

definitions.en: links a chunk to its structural boundary such as offset, token span, line range, page range, section break, semantic boundary, or overlap.
definitions.zh: 分块具有边界关系把分块连接到偏移、令牌跨度、行范围、页范围、章节断点、语义边界或重叠等结构边界。
definitions.ja: チャンクが境界を持つ関係は、チャンクをオフセット、トークン範囲、行範囲、ページ範囲、節の切れ目、意味境界、重なりなどの構造境界へ結び付けます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_has_boundary relation from Chunk to ChunkBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_has_boundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_has_boundary relation from Chunk to ChunkBoundary. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_has_boundary is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

definitions.en: links a chunk to provenance evidence covering source version, checksum, ingestion run, transformation history, and document span.
definitions.zh: 分块具有来源关系把分块连接到覆盖来源版本、校验和、摄入运行、转换历史和文档片段的来源证据。
definitions.ja: チャンクが来歴を持つ関係は、チャンクを出典版、チェックサム、取り込み実行、変換履歴、文書範囲を含む来歴証拠へ結び付けます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_has_provenance relation from Chunk to ChunkProvenance. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_has_provenance is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_has_provenance relation from Chunk to ChunkProvenance. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_has_provenance is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

definitions.en: links a chunk reference to the exact source span, anchor, line range, page range, offset, or document version it cites.
definitions.zh: 分块引用指向来源片段关系把分块引用连接到其引用的精确来源片段、锚点、行范围、页范围、偏移或文档版本。
definitions.ja: チャンク参照が出典範囲を指す関係は、チャンク参照を引用先の正確な出典範囲、アンカー、行範囲、ページ範囲、オフセット、文書版へ結び付けます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_reference_targets_source_span relation from ChunkReference to SourceSpan. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_reference_targets_source_span is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunk_reference_targets_source_span relation from ChunkReference to SourceSpan. The ontology-specific boundary for chunk_reference_targets_source_span is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

definitions.zh: 分块通过统一元数据对象附着边界、来源和质量信息。
definitions.en: A Chunk attaches boundary, provenance, and quality information through ChunkMetadata.
definitions.ja: Chunk は ChunkMetadata を通じて境界・来歴・品質情報を付与します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed has_metadata relation from Chunk to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for Chunk-has_metadata-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed has_metadata relation from Chunk to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for Chunk-has_metadata-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LlamaIndex agents docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块 是一种 分块信息制品。区分特征：任一 Chunk 都是保留来源跨度、边界和检索元数据的 ChunkArtifact。
definitions.en: chunk is a kind of chunk artifact. Reviewed differentia: Every Chunk is a ChunkArtifact distinguished by a bounded source span and retrieval metadata.
definitions.ja: チャンク は チャンク情報成果物 の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての Chunk は有界出典範囲と検索メタデータを持つ ChunkArtifact です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from Chunk to ChunkArtifact. The ontology-specific boundary for Chunk-is_a-ChunkArtifact is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from Chunk to ChunkArtifact. The ontology-specific boundary for Chunk-is_a-ChunkArtifact is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LlamaIndex agents docs heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块边界 是一种 分块元数据。区分特征：分块边界是描述起止偏移、页行范围或语义断点的 ChunkMetadata。
definitions.en: chunk boundary is a kind of chunk metadata. Reviewed differentia: A ChunkBoundary is ChunkMetadata specifying offsets, page or line ranges, or semantic breaks.
definitions.ja: チャンク境界 は チャンクメタデータ の一種です。審査済みの種差：ChunkBoundary はオフセット・頁行範囲・意味区切りを指定する ChunkMetadata です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkBoundary to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkBoundary-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkBoundary to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkBoundary-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 压缩活动读取分块内容与来源锚点。
definitions.en: Chunk compression consumes chunk content and source anchors.
definitions.ja: チャンク圧縮活動は内容と出典アンカーを消費します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed consumes relation from ChunkCompression to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkCompression-consumes-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed consumes relation from ChunkCompression to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkCompression-consumes-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块压缩活动 是一种 分块处理活动。区分特征：旧定义的“压缩产物”会混淆输入与过程；裁决为保留来源锚点并产生新 Chunk 的活动，而产物仍是 Chunk。
definitions.en: chunk compression activity is a kind of chunk processing activity. Reviewed differentia: The legacy 'compression artifact' wording conflates process and output; this is reviewed as an activity that preserves source anchors and produces a new Chunk, whose output remains a Chunk.
definitions.ja: チャンク圧縮活動 は チャンク処理活動 の一種です。審査済みの種差：旧定義の「圧縮成果物」は工程と出力を混同するため、出典アンカーを保ち新 Chunk を生成する活動へ再分類し、成果物は Chunk のままとします。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkCompression to ChunkProcessingActivity. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkCompression-is_a-ChunkProcessingActivity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkCompression to ChunkProcessingActivity. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkCompression-is_a-ChunkProcessingActivity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 压缩产生新版本 Chunk，不原地改写输入。
definitions.en: Compression produces a new Chunk version rather than mutating its input.
definitions.ja: 圧縮は入力を直接変更せず新しい Chunk 版を生成します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed produces relation from ChunkCompression to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkCompression-produces-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed produces relation from ChunkCompression to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkCompression-produces-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块上下文注记 是一种 分块元数据。区分特征：该注记是说明局部章节、周边语境或检索相关性的 ChunkMetadata。
definitions.en: chunk context note is a kind of chunk metadata. Reviewed differentia: A ChunkContextNote is ChunkMetadata explaining local section, surrounding context, or retrieval relevance.
definitions.ja: チャンク文脈注記 は チャンクメタデータ の一種です。審査済みの種差：ChunkContextNote は局所節・周辺文脈・検索関連性を説明する ChunkMetadata です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkContextNote to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkContextNote-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkContextNote to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkContextNote-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块运行必须有原始文档输入。
definitions.en: A chunking run must identify its source Document input.
definitions.ja: 分割実行は元 Document 入力を特定する必要があります。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed consumes relation from ChunkingRun to Document. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkingRun-consumes-Document is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed consumes relation from ChunkingRun to Document. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkingRun-consumes-Document is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Paper > COMPASS: Enhancing Agent Long-Horizon Reasoning with Evolving Context; abstract and method or system-architecture sections

definitions.zh: 分块运行 是一种 分块处理活动。区分特征：分块运行是按策略把文档划分为可检索 Chunk 的 ChunkProcessingActivity。
definitions.en: chunking run is a kind of chunk processing activity. Reviewed differentia: A ChunkingRun is a ChunkProcessingActivity that partitions a Document into retrievable Chunks under a strategy.
definitions.ja: 分割実行 は チャンク処理活動 の一種です。審査済みの種差：ChunkingRun は方策に従い Document を検索可能 Chunk へ分割する ChunkProcessingActivity です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkingRun to ChunkProcessingActivity. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkingRun-is_a-ChunkProcessingActivity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkingRun to ChunkProcessingActivity. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkingRun-is_a-ChunkProcessingActivity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LlamaIndex workflows heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块活动产生带边界和来源的 Chunk。
definitions.en: Chunking produces Chunks with boundaries and provenance.
definitions.ja: 分割活動は境界・来歴付き Chunk を生成します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed chunking_run_produces_chunk relation from ChunkingRun to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for chunking_run_produces_chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed produces relation from ChunkingRun to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkingRun-produces-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块重叠 是一种 分块元数据。区分特征：重叠量和共享跨度是相邻分块的结构元数据，不是分块或活动。
definitions.en: chunk overlap is a kind of chunk metadata. Reviewed differentia: The overlap amount and shared span are structural ChunkMetadata for adjacent chunks, not a chunk or activity.
definitions.ja: チャンク重複範囲 は チャンクメタデータ の一種です。審査済みの種差：重複量と共有範囲は隣接チャンクの構造 ChunkMetadata で、チャンクや活動ではありません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkOverlap to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkOverlap-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkOverlap to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkOverlap-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块来源记录 是一种 分块元数据。区分特征：来源记录是连接文档版本、跨度、校验和、摄入与变换历史的 ChunkMetadata。
definitions.en: chunk provenance is a kind of chunk metadata. Reviewed differentia: ChunkProvenance is ChunkMetadata linking document version, span, checksum, ingestion, and transformation history.
definitions.ja: チャンク来歴 は チャンクメタデータ の一種です。審査済みの種差：ChunkProvenance は文書版・範囲・チェックサム・取込・変換履歴を結ぶ ChunkMetadata です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkProvenance to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkProvenance-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkProvenance to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkProvenance-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块质量信号 是一种 分块元数据。区分特征：质量信号是记录解析完整性、重复、陈旧或毒性证据的 ChunkMetadata，而非 Chunk 的种类。
definitions.en: chunk quality signal is a kind of chunk metadata. Reviewed differentia: A ChunkQualitySignal is ChunkMetadata recording parsing, duplication, staleness, or toxicity evidence rather than a kind of Chunk.
definitions.ja: チャンク品質シグナル は チャンクメタデータ の一種です。審査済みの種差：ChunkQualitySignal は解析・重複・陳腐化・毒性証拠を記録する ChunkMetadata で、Chunk の種類ではありません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkQualitySignal to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkQualitySignal-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkQualitySignal to ChunkMetadata. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkQualitySignal-is_a-ChunkMetadata is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块引用 是一种 分块信息制品。区分特征：分块引用是可独立传递且指向确切 Chunk/来源跨度的 ChunkArtifact，不复制被引节点。
definitions.en: chunk reference is a kind of chunk artifact. Reviewed differentia: A ChunkReference is a transferable ChunkArtifact pointing to an exact Chunk and source span without copying it.
definitions.ja: チャンク参照 は チャンク情報成果物 の一種です。審査済みの種差：ChunkReference は正確な Chunk・出典範囲を複製せず指す伝達可能 ChunkArtifact です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkReference to ChunkArtifact. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkReference-is_a-ChunkArtifact is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from ChunkReference to ChunkArtifact. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkReference-is_a-ChunkArtifact is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 引用指向唯一分块及其确切来源跨度。
definitions.en: A ChunkReference points to one canonical Chunk and its exact source span.
definitions.ja: ChunkReference は一意の Chunk と正確な出典範囲を指します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed references relation from ChunkReference to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkReference-references-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed references relation from ChunkReference to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for ChunkReference-references-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 已定位分块 是一种 分块。区分特征：任一 SituatedChunk 仍是 Chunk，并以附加局部语境和任务相关根据信息作为区分特征。
definitions.en: situated chunk is a kind of chunk. Reviewed differentia: Every SituatedChunk remains a Chunk, distinguished by added local context and task-relevant grounding.
definitions.ja: 位置付け済みチャンク は チャンク の一種です。審査済みの種差：すべての SituatedChunk は Chunk であり、局所文脈とタスク関連根拠の追加で区別されます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SituatedChunk to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatedChunk-is_a-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SituatedChunk to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatedChunk-is_a-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 定位运行以原分块为输入，不能把运行当分块子类。
definitions.en: A situating run consumes a Chunk; the run is not a chunk subtype.
definitions.ja: 位置付け実行は Chunk を消費し、実行はチャンクの下位型ではありません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed consumes relation from SituatingPromptRun to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatingPromptRun-consumes-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed consumes relation from SituatingPromptRun to Chunk. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatingPromptRun-consumes-Chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 分块定位提示运行 是一种 分块处理活动。区分特征：该运行是给 Chunk 补充可追溯局部语境的 ChunkProcessingActivity。
definitions.en: situating prompt run is a kind of chunk processing activity. Reviewed differentia: A SituatingPromptRun is a ChunkProcessingActivity that adds traceable local grounding to a Chunk.
definitions.ja: 位置付けプロンプト実行 は チャンク処理活動 の一種です。審査済みの種差：SituatingPromptRun は Chunk に追跡可能な局所根拠を加える ChunkProcessingActivity です。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SituatingPromptRun to ChunkProcessingActivity. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatingPromptRun-is_a-ChunkProcessingActivity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed is_a relation from SituatingPromptRun to ChunkProcessingActivity. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatingPromptRun-is_a-ChunkProcessingActivity is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LlamaIndex workflows heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.zh: 定位输出是保留原来源且补充局部语境的下位分块。
definitions.en: Situating produces a SituatedChunk that preserves the source and adds local grounding.
definitions.ja: 位置付けは出典を保ち局所根拠を加えた SituatedChunk を生成します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed produces relation from SituatingPromptRun to SituatedChunk. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatingPromptRun-produces-SituatedChunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed produces relation from SituatingPromptRun to SituatedChunk. The ontology-specific boundary for SituatingPromptRun-produces-SituatedChunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangChain agents heading and documented conceptual model

definitions.en: links context assembly to the ordering rule that placed messages, memory, summaries, instructions, and tool results in context.
definitions.zh: 上下文组装应用排序规则关系把上下文组装连接到放置消息、记忆、摘要、指令和工具结果的排序规则。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト組み立てが順序規則を適用する関係は、メッセージ、記憶、要約、指示、ツール結果を文脈内へ配置した順序規則へコンテキスト組み立てを結び付けます。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed context_assembly_applies_ordering_rule relation from ContextAssembly to ContextOrderingRule. The ontology-specific boundary for context_assembly_applies_ordering_rule is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed context_assembly_applies_ordering_rule relation from ContextAssembly to ContextOrderingRule. The ontology-specific boundary for context_assembly_applies_ordering_rule is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

definitions.en: records that context assembly included a retrieved chunk in the runtime-visible context for a model call or agent step.
definitions.zh: 上下文组装纳入已检索分块关系记录上下文组装把已检索分块纳入模型调用或智能体步骤的运行可见上下文。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト組み立てが検索済みチャンクを含める関係は、モデル呼び出しまたはエージェントステップの実行可視文脈へ検索済みチャンクを組み込んだことを記録します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed context_assembly_includes_retrieved_chunk relation from ContextAssembly to RetrievedChunk. The ontology-specific boundary for context_assembly_includes_retrieved_chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed context_assembly_includes_retrieved_chunk relation from ContextAssembly to RetrievedChunk. The ontology-specific boundary for context_assembly_includes_retrieved_chunk is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

definitions.en: links context assembly to the token, cost, freshness, priority, or window budget that constrained inclusion decisions.
